events.description: segment opens, 'Code Injection' title fades in with red accent line
syringe icon pops in with spring scale — 'inject code'
project folder icon slides in from right — 'your projects'
VS Code extension puzzle icon pops in with pulse ring — malicious extension
package.json file panel slides up, code lines appear staggered — 'quietly modifies'
package.json header glows amber — file name highlighted
malicious dependency line types in character by character with cursor — key injection moment
red glow appears on injected line, left border turns red — backdoor hint
scene crossfades from injection view to diff view
diff panel slides up showing +1 green line — looks legitimate
red scanning line sweeps down diff, green line turns red — backdoor revealed
'The diff looks like a normal update' badge appears with eye-slash icon
'Contains a backdoor' red warning badge pops in with spring — final danger reveal
